Aggie Weston Pastoral Worker receives Commendation.
Aggie Weston's Helping serving sailors, marines their families.
Aggie Weston Pastoral Worker receives Commendation.
Aggie Weston's Pastoral Worker Simon Thomas recently awarded Naval Base Commander Devonport Commendation from Commodore Shipperley.
Simon earned commendation working alongside RNRMW Plymouth they re-launched community centres catering families across city, award also recognised Simon's hard work Aggie Weston's Pastoral Worker, which places alongside families across Plymouth enables help with pre-deployment events.
